headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the dow jones index on Thursday.
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: Citi Turns More Bullish on Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Ahead of Second-Quarter Results
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 10 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy for Long-Term Investors. On June 24, Citi raised its price recommendation on The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) to $380 from $355. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The move was part of the firm’s second-quarter earnings preview for companies in […]
